briefing:
## 🌍 Top 5 Global Fintech News

- **[Fintech founder charged with fraud; AI app found to be humans in the Philippines](https://techcrunch.com/2025/04/10/fintech-founder-charged-with-fraud-after-ai-shopping-app-found-to-be-powered-by-humans-in-the-philippines/)** — *Hacker News* — A fintech founder faces fraud charges after their supposedly AI-powered shopping app was revealed to be operated by human workers in the Philippines.

- **[Fintech dystopia](https://fintechdystopia.com/)** — *Hacker News* — A widely-circulated site cataloguing the darker consequences and failures emerging from the modern fintech industry.

- **[Americans see their savings vanish in Synapse fintech crisis](https://www.cnbc.com/2024/11/22/synapse-bankruptcy-thousands-of-americans-see-their-savings-vanish.html)** — *Hacker News* — Thousands of Americans lost access to their savings following the collapse of fintech middleware provider Synapse, raising urgent questions about consumer protections in banking-as-a-service models.

- **[Open Banking and Payments Competition](https://www.bitsaboutmoney.com/archive/open-banking-and-payments-competition/)** — *Hacker News* — A deep-dive analysis exploring how open banking frameworks are reshaping competition in the payments landscape.

- **[Apple acquires UK open banking startup Credit Kudos](https://ffnews.com/newsarticle/apple-acquires-uk-open-banking-startup-credit-kudos/)** — *Hacker News* — Apple has acquired UK-based open banking startup Credit Kudos, signalling the tech giant's growing ambitions in financial data and credit services.

---

## 🍁 Top 5 Canadian Fintech News

- **[Neo Financial becomes second FinTech to join Interac payment system](https://betakit.com/neo-financial-becomes-second-fintech-to-join-interac-payment-system/)** — *BetaKit* — Calgary-based Neo Financial has become only the second fintech company to gain direct membership in Canada's Interac payment network, marking a significant milestone for fintech access to core Canadian payments infrastructure.

- **[NYT claims Bitcoin creator is founder of Canadian company Blockstream](https://betakit.com/new-york-times-claims-bitcoin-creator-is-founder-of-canadian-company-blockstream/)** — *BetaKit* — The New York Times has alleged that the pseudonymous Bitcoin creator Satoshi Nakamoto is the founder of Canadian blockchain infrastructure company Blockstream.

- **[How the war in the Middle East is already impacting mortgage rates in Canada](https://www.cbc.ca/news/canada/iran-war-mortgage-rates-canada-9.7152182?cmp=rss)** — *CBC Business* — Ongoing geopolitical conflict in the Middle East is creating uncertainty in global bond markets, with direct ripple effects on Canadian mortgage rates.

- **[How new SR&ED changes could supercharge Canadian hard tech and manufacturing startups](https://betakit.com/how-new-sred-changes-could-supercharge-canadian-hard-tech-and-manufacturing-startups/)** — *BetaKit* — Proposed reforms to Canada's Scientific Research and Experimental Development tax credit program could significantly boost funding for hard tech and manufacturing startups across the country.

- **[Canada calls screen scraping 'unsecure,' sets Open Banking target for 2023](https://finledger.com/2021/08/09/canada-sets-open-banking-target-for-2023/)** — *Hacker News* — *(Evergreen relevance)* Canada's early positioning against screen scraping in favour of a secure open banking framework laid the groundwork for the country's ongoing consumer-directed finance journey.

---

## 🌊 Bonus: Relevant to Atlantic Fintech's Focus (1–3 articles)

- **[BDC launches $150-million life sciences fund](https://betakit.com/bdc-launches-150-million-life-sciences-fund/)** — *BetaKit* — The Business Development Bank of Canada is deploying a new $150-million fund targeting life sciences startups, a signal of continued federal appetite for venture investment in Canadian innovation ecosystems — relevant to Atlantic founders watching BDC's broader funding activity.

- **[SOLOWIN HOLDINGS Announces Participation in Libeara's Funding Round to Accelerate Growth of the Tokenization Ecosystem](https://financialpost.com/globe-newswire/solowin-holdings-announces-participation-in-libearas-funding-round-to-accelerate-growth-of-the-tokenization-ecosystem)** — *Financial Post* — Fintech firm SOLOWIN Holdings is backing Libeara's tokenization platform, reflecting growing global momentum in asset tokenization that Atlantic fintech builders in digital assets and embedded finance should watch closely.
